source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for part of executor_test

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("4", "3", "2", "1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("4", "3", "2", "1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates part of `executor_test` from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Test-infra migration can resolve suite lifecycle / fixture issues and reduce framework-related flakiness by using modern `testing.T` + testify patterns.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy gocheck-based tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) order by a desc").Check(testkit.Rows("4", "3", "2", "1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
